intent: Classify non-source image drift roots as Studio working copy, poster/reference output, frozen incoming reference, derived output, or manual custody review before any archive move.
source_rule: Non-source disposition is review evidence only. It does not approve source archive moves, deletion, runtime sync, receipt writes, or deploys.

root_rows.label: Codex Studio import
root_rows.decision: Promote selected Studio image into assets-src with metadata, register as Studio-only reference, or remove it from the working surface after evidence review.

root_rows.label: Android packaged assets
root_rows.decision: Review manually before source promotion, retention, cleanup, or archive claims.

root_rows.label: Incoming dropped Studio bundle
root_rows.decision: Keep as frozen incoming-drop evidence. Promote a specific file only through a source-registration lane.

root_rows.label: Codex poster outputs
root_rows.decision: Keep as poster/reference output unless a human selects a specific image for source registration.

root_rows.label: Debug client dist atlas
root_rows.decision: Rebuild from source or prune as distribution output; never use it as source authority.

root_rows.label: Debug client public atlas
root_rows.decision: Review manually before source promotion, retention, cleanup, or archive claims.

root_rows.label: Game built assets
root_rows.decision: Review manually before source promotion, retention, cleanup, or archive claims.

record_rows.decision: Review manually before source promotion, retention, cleanup, or archive claims.

required_next_gate: Resolve Studio working-copy drift through promote, register, or remove decisions outside archive execution.
Retain poster/reference outputs unless a specific image is selected for source registration.
Keep incoming-drop references frozen unless a specific file is promoted through source registration.
Rerun the mapper after any non-source decision and verify this report still has zero executable rows.
